title: inula stenophylla
intro: Inula stenophylla, also known as the Narrow-leaved Elecampane, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Inula stenophylla include its potential to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Inula stenophylla can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
